title: Open the playground from the home page
description: Verifies a user can navigate to the home page hero section and click the 'Try the Playground' button to open the Playground view.

steps.description: Click the 'Try the Playground' button in the hero section
Verify navigation succeeded and the Playground view is displayed

title: Open configuration from the playground sidebar
description: Verifies a user can open the Playground via the nav bar and then navigate to the Configuration view using the sidebar logo button.

steps.description: Click the logo button in the sidebar to open Configuration
Verify navigation succeeded and the Configuration view is displayed

title: Navigate between the main landing page sections
description: Verifies a user can navigate between marketing landing page sections (How It Works, Playground, Configuration) using the top navigation bar.

steps.description: Click the 'How It Works' navigation button
Verify navigation succeeded and the final view is displayed
